mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, day_number, created_at FROM itinerary_days WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY day_number ASC
SELECT id, post_id, day_number, created_at FROM itinerary_days WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, day_id, place_name, memo, order_number, created_at FROM itinerary_items WHERE day_id = #{dayId} ORDER BY order_number ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary_items ( day_id, place_name, memo, order_number ) VALUES ( #{dayId}, #{placeName}, #{memo}, #{orderNumber} )
